name: Sourdough Biscuits
recipeIngredient: 1 Salad oil, butter or bacon grease
recipeInstructions:
Mix the starter and milk in a large bowl. (Prepare the night before for breakfast.) Cover and keep at room temperature to let rise.
Turn this out onto 1 cup flour on a bread board. Combine salt, sugar, baking powder, and soda with the remaining 1/2 cup of flour and sift over the top. With your hands, knead lightly until the proper consistency is achieved. Roll to a thickness of 1/2 inch. Cut out and dip in either warm bacon grease or a mixture of half salad oil and melted butter.
Place close together in a 9 x 9 pan and set in a warm place to rise for about half an hour. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F until golden brown, making about 14 biscuits.
